headline: Of the 100 candidates we shortlist, a keyword filter ranks 28 outside its own top 100 — a recruiter relying on keyword search would never see 28% of who we recommend.

rescued_with_proof.their_own_words: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
